Based on the detailed review of the literature and case characteristics, I confirm that the most likely diagnosis remains Sturge-Weber Syndrome given the key points:
1. Vascular plaques along the ophthalmic and maxillary divisions of the trigeminal nerve indicate characteristic neurocutaneous marking.
2. No change over time matches typical benign and longstanding nature of Sturge-Weber's features.
Thus, the evidence continues to support option B - Sturge-Weber Syndrome despite potential confusion among less common presentations. My agreement stands firm.

基于检索到的证据进一步分析如下：
关键依据在于患者的体征符合典型的Sturge-Weber综合症特征——即三叉神经的眼支和上颌支受影响的血管瘤，以及这种病变从出生起就无变化的情况完全支持这一长期稳定的病症特点。因此，这些新信息继续证实了最初的推断，即最有可能的是选项 A — 许旺病（Sturge-Weber 综合症）。我的结论依然不变。\boxed{\text{A}}
